envCheckDesc: Check the development tools required for CC-Panes
installClaudeHint: Please install Claude Code: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
envNotReady: Please install the missing tools first
cliChoiceDesc: CC-Panes supports multiple CLI tools. Choose the one you primarily use
welcomeDesc: CC-Panes is a multi-instance split-pane manager for Claude Code.
conceptDesc: CC-Panes uses a three-layer model to organize your work:
conceptWorkspace: Workspace — A collection of projects with configuration and session logs
conceptProject: Project — Corresponds to a Git repository or code directory
conceptTask: Task — A specific task under a project, displayed as a terminal tab
aiGuideIntro: Next, the AI assistant will guide you to create your first workspace and import projects.
startAiGuideDisabled: Please complete the environment check first
